reviews.comment:
Mala atencion fui el dia 8/11  me atendio una chica muy mala onda...al salir afuera solo escuche a los socios disgustados porq no le abrian el porton para hacer entrar el auto, me sente afuera a esperar que me busque la combi para volver a mi pueblo ya que estaba de pasada y se acercaron dos señores super irrespetuosos socios de este lugar,uno dijo q sentia verguenza que este sentada ahi,yo no se a q se refirio,ni se a q acostumbran pero estaba vestida desente con jeans zapatillas camisa para q me trate asi ,asi q me levante y pregunte al playero si se podia sentar en ese lugar y me dijo q si...fui a ese lugar porq me dio seguridad a la hora de esperar mi trasporte y resulto ser peor...

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I went on November 8th and was served by a very rude girl. When I went outside, I could only hear the members complaining because they weren't opening the gate to let their car in. I sat outside waiting for the van to take me back to my town since I was just passing through. Two extremely disrespectful men, members of this place, approached me. One said he was ashamed that I was sitting there. I don't know what he meant, or what they usually do, but I was dressed decently in jeans, sneakers, and a shirt, so why would he treat me like that? I got up and asked the attendant if I could sit there, and he said yes. I went to that place because it made me feel safe while waiting for my transport, and it turned out to be worse.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneUpuUXhBRRAB
